data.content_ref: inline:{"claim": "A coordinated wave of maritime raiders—originating from disenfranchised Cycladic communities—disrupted trade routes and precipitated political fragmentation.", "mechanism": "external demographic pressure through seaborne raids", "scope": {"covers": ["Mycenaean trade networks", "Hittite coastal ports", "Ugaritic harbor cities"], "excludes": ["Inland Hittite heartland", "Egypt"]}, "forbidden": [{"case": "Archaeological layers show no increase in weaponry or fortifications along the affected coasts", "eval": "rubric:std-hist"}], "prose_notes": "Matrix compares raid intensity, trade volume loss, and subsequent administrative breakdown for each polity."}
